results.title: 'A bad light on English football' | Austin blasts Southampton over 'spygate' scandal
results.description: Charlie Austin reflects on the decision to ban Southampton from the play-off final following the 'spygate' scandal and insists that the EFL have made the correct decision against his former club.

results.title: Rafa Jódar se apunta a Queen’s
results.description: Rafa Jódar, cuartofinalista en Madrid y Roma este año, se ha apuntado al torneo de Queen's, donde figura como el principal español.

results.title: Safeguarding Afcon 2027: Why Ministry of Sports want extra billions in 2026/27 financial year
results.description: NAIROBI, Kenya, May 20, 2026 – The Ministry of Sports is seeking additional funds to aid preparations for next year’s Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon). Appearing before the National Assembly’s committee on Sports and Culture on Tuesday, Principal Secretary Elijah Mwangi says their budget for the 2026/27 financial year should be increased to Ksh 32.24 [...] The post Safeguarding Afcon 2027: Why Ministry of Sports want extra billions in 2026/27 financial year appeared first on Capital Sports .
